name: Tsung
description: Open-source multi-protocol distributed load testing tool written in Erlang, supporting HTTP, WebDAV, PostgreSQL, MySQL, LDAP, MQTT and XMPP.

seo.title: Tsung — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Tsung: Open-source multi-protocol distributed load testing tool written in Erlang, supporting HTTP, WebDAV, PostgreSQL, MySQL, LDAP, MQTT and XMPP.

when_to_use: Distributed Erlang-based load testing at extreme scale
Multi-protocol load tests: HTTP, PostgreSQL, MQTT, XMPP
Simulate realistic user behavior with XML scenario files
Scale load across a cluster of machines effortlessly

pros: Supports HTTP, XMPP, MQTT, Postgres, LDAP
Scales to millions of simulated users
Open source with long track record
cons: k6 and Locust dominate modern load testing
review.verdict: Historically strong for multi-protocol load tests, but k6 and Locust have surpassed it for most teams.
review.best_for: Legacy setups or niche protocols like XMPP needing distributed load simulation
review.not_for: New load testing where k6 scripts offer vastly better ergonomics
